title: Engagement Start
body: Set your variables first — every command references them. What is your current situation?
cmd:
export ip=10.10.10.10
export subnet=192.168.185.0/24
export lhost=10.10.14.x
export lport=443
export domain=domain.com

mkdir -p $ip/{scans,exploits,screenshots,loot}
cd $ip
touch users passwords hashes   # running cred lists - append as you enumerate

choices.label: Single target IP — full port scan
AD domain, no creds — unauth recon
🧭 Find the attack vector from a finding
I am stuck / spinning / losing time
Pre-exam setup — before the clock starts
Jump to technique — skip the flow
